title: Tao Te Ching 24
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 24 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 24 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: One who stands on tiptoe does not stand firm. One who takes long strides does not walk well.
